title: post api login php with valid and invalid credentials
description: Test the POST /api/login.php endpoint with valid username and password to receive a successful authentication response and session cookie. Also test with invalid password to verify failure response and no session cookie.

title: post api logout php session termination
description: Test the POST /api/logout.php endpoint to ensure it properly destroys the active session for an authenticated user and returns a success status.

title: get api me php session introspection
description: Test the GET /api/me.php endpoint to verify it returns the correct authentication status and user information based on the presence or absence of a valid session cookie.

title: get api students php retrieve all students
description: Test the GET /api/students.php endpoint to ensure it returns a list of all student records with correct fields and no authentication required.

title: post api create student php with authentication
description: Test the POST /api/create_student.php endpoint with valid session cookie and valid student data to create a new student record successfully. Also test without session cookie to verify unauthorized access handling.

title: post api update student php with existing and non existing id
description: Test the POST /api/update_student.php endpoint with valid session cookie and existing student id to update the record successfully. Also test with non-existent id to verify failure response. Test without session cookie to observe authentication enforcement behavior.

title: post api delete student php with existing and non existing id
description: Test the POST /api/delete_student.php endpoint with valid session cookie and existing student id to delete the record successfully. Also test with non-existent id to verify failure response. Test without session cookie to observe authentication enforcement behavior.
